name: Get笔记 (getnote)
description: Personal knowledge base management skill. Save, query, and delete notes with tag support. Handles text, link, and image notes. Manage your knowledge base directly from your AI agent.
review: Strong traction with 307 downloads and 12 stars demonstrates real user adoption. Personal knowledge base management with multi-type note support (text, link, image) and tag-based organization fills a practical gap. ClawHub-only distribution with solid usage metrics.
